prestazioni: AM11 6.0L V12 (engine code: AM08/11) forced induction upgrade via twin Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbos with 46mm wastegates, custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipes, and a bespoke air-to-water intercooler system from Bell Intercoolers, pushing 850hp at 1.5 bar on 100-octane fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing direct port injection and sequential ignition timing

Full titanium valvetrain overhaul with Ferrea F15 series intake/exhaust valves, titanium retainers, and upgraded valve springs from Supertech, paired with a custom billet camshaft from Schrick (290° intake / 284° exhaust duration, 12.5mm lift) for optimized high-RPM airflow

TTE 800+ transmission reinforcement kit including a billet 300M steel input shaft, upgraded carbon synchros, and a multi-plate sintered clutch from Sachs Performance (800Nm torque capacity), mated to a Quaife ATB differential with 4.09:1 final drive ratio for aggressive acceleration
estetica: Full Zagato Heritage carbon fiber body kit with exposed weave finish, including a 3D-printed front splitter with integrated NACA ducts (manufactured by Novitec), side skirts with active air curtains, and a rear diffuser with titanium Gurney flaps from Vorsteiner

Custom 22-inch forged OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (9.5x22 ET30 front, 12.5x22 ET40 rear) wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 front, 325/25 rear), paired with AP Racing 6-piston monoblock calipers and 400mm carbon-ceramic rotors with titanium bobbin hardware

Interior rework featuring a full Alcantara headliner with diamond stitching, Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, 6-point Schroth harnesses), and a bespoke titanium roll cage from Matter Fab with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360), finished with a Momo Prototipo steering wheel and a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada
